typecheck.detail: Compiled clean (3 unused-variable warnings in drawing/fonts, all pre-existing)

lint.detail: No linter in services.yaml; compiler warnings reviewed — all pre-existing, none from compositing-model changes

nonBlockingIssues.description: clear_buffer() uses unsafe ptr::write_bytes where buf.fill(0) would suffice — correct but unnecessarily unsafe
end_frame() uses swap_remove which invalidates PoolHandle indices — safe under current usage (all released before end_frame) but a latent footgun for future consumers
SurfacePool not actually used for offscreen allocation — opacity path uses vec![0u8;...] instead (acknowledged borrow-checker trade-off)
blit_blend_with_opacity casts negative nx/ny to u32 causing nodes at negative absolute coords to be invisible with opacity < 255 but partially visible with opacity = 255
stroke_width=1 at scale=1.0 now produces half_width=0 (invisible) — correct per contract but minimum visible stroke is now stroke_width=2

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md: (1) Removed 'known non-blocking bug' note about stroke width — fixed in this milestone. Added minimum visible stroke note. (2) Added SurfacePool section documenting lifecycle contract, constraints, MAX_ENTRIES, budget, and current integration status.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The os-worker skill's Visual Verification step should note that when the user's QEMU has test.img locked, smoke.sh is an acceptable boot-verification alternative. Pixel-level correctness can be verified via unit tests with assertions on rendered framebuffer contents.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: per-subtree-opacity worker deviated from Step 6 by running smoke test instead of full QEMU visual test, with justified reasoning. The deviation was safe and effective.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the test count references in AGENTS.md from ~1555/~1606 to ~1698, or use a more general phrasing like 'all tests in system/test/' to avoid staleness.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md says ~1555 tests, services.yaml area says ~1606, actual count is now 1698 after compositing-model milestone. The count grows with every milestone.

rejectedObservations.observation: SurfacePool lifecycle contract should be documented in the architecture library
rejectedObservations.reason: Applied directly — added SurfacePool section to .factory/library/architecture.md with lifecycle contract, constraints, and current integration status
